question: 26年MDL工厂top10投入型号及其物量
intent: 查询 2026 年 MDL 工厂投入型号 top10 及其 panel 物量
sql: SELECT product_ID, SUM(Panel_qty) AS actual_input_panel_qty FROM production_actuals WHERE work_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-12-31' AND FACTORY = 'MDL' AND act_type = '投入' GROUP BY product_ID ORDER BY actual_input_panel_qty DESC LIMIT 10;
notes: 真实调试样例。LLM 生成 SQL 已经按生产实绩表、act_type=投入、Panel_qty 物量口径校验通过。

question: 最新5版p版需求中，202604需求量最多的fgcode是哪一个
normalized_question: 最新5版p版需求中，202604需求量最多的fgcode是哪一个
intent: 查询最新 5 版 P 版需求中 202604 需求量最高的 FGCODE
sql: WITH latest_versions AS (SELECT PM_VERSION FROM p_demand GROUP BY PM_VERSION ORDER BY PM_VERSION DESC LIMIT 5), demand_unpivot AS (SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CAST(MONTH AS CHAR) AS demand_month, REQUIREMENT_QTY AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, NEXT_REQUIREMENT AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, LAST_REQUIREMENT AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 3 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH4 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH5 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH6 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH7 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand) SELECT FGCODE, SUM(demand_qty) AS demand_qty FROM demand_unpivot WHERE demand_month = '202604' AND PM_VERSION IN (SELECT PM_VERSION FROM latest_versions) GROUP BY FGCODE ORDER BY demand_qty DESC LIMIT 1;
notes: 真实调试样例。当前记录的是 live LLM 生成出的 demand 横表展开 SQL。

question: 最新p版，最近6个月的ttl需求物量
normalized_question: 最新p版，最近6个月的ttl需求物量
intent: 查询最新 1 版 P 版需求在最近 6 个月各需求月份的 total 需求物量
sql: WITH latest_version AS (SELECT PM_VERSION FROM p_demand GROUP BY PM_VERSION ORDER BY PM_VERSION DESC LIMIT 1), demand_unpivot AS (SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, CAST(MONTH AS CHAR) AS demand_month, REQUIREMENT_QTY AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, NEXT_REQUIREMENT AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, LAST_REQUIREMENT AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 3 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH4 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH5 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH6 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH7 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand) SELECT demand_month, SUM(COALESCE(demand_qty, 0)) AS ttl_demand_qty FROM demand_unpivot WHERE PM_VERSION IN (SELECT PM_VERSION FROM latest_version) AND demand_month BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y%m') AND DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m') GROUP BY demand_month ORDER BY demand_month;
notes: 真实调试样例。当前校验目标是最新 1 版 P 版需求 + 最近 6 个月 + 月度 total 需求物量的语义解析与 SQL 结构。
